This dichotomy reveals whether the molecule's thermodynamics are dispersion-dominated or polarity-dominated.
hypothesis.test_method: Both parameter sets will be evaluated in parallel through molecular dynamics simulations to measure density, heat of vaporization, surface tension, and dipole moment, determining which interaction balance better reproduces experimental observables.
